title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・最たる光満ちて今

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Mejiro Ardan! Tearing past the Eternal Top Three, Mejiro Ardan is making a break for it! Annnd she crosses the finish line! Ladies and gentlemen, this is the moment! Your winner has been decided!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Lady Ardan... That was truly remarkable...
...Perhaps our next meeting will be on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I bested... the Eternal Top Three!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Congratulations. You did it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Thank you for your kind words.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Your running was amazing! I'm so glad I got to race with you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You beat me so fair and square I actually feel
good about it! That was reeeally something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've always found your running to be peculiar.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's like there's all kinds of dazzling light in you... I
don't know how to put this...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...It shines like a brilliant, prismatic glass
ornament.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. Your running is wonderful. That's what I'm
trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, you've said so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: To hear that from you... is an honor.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: Looks like you altered the course of history.
Looks like you altered the course of history.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
You were hella awesome, Mejiro Ardan! It's your
era to win!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
The Eternal Top Three is practically the Eternal
Top Four at this point! Mejiro Ardan, you rock!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, everyone. And if I may, I'd
like to have your attention for a moment, please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My name is Mejiro Ardan. Having bathed in the radiance of so many others, I stand here now, shining with a light comprising countless colors!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let my light illuminate Fuchu for all eternity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I could... borrow your shoulder to
lean on?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just so happy right now... I'm afraid my legs
might give way at any moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help Mejiro Ardan stay on her feet as we make
our way back, listening all the while to the crowd
cheering her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in the waiting room, I can hear muffled
echoes of it as Ardan sinks into sleep, completely
wiped from the run.
